title: Anaeat Mini Silicone Spatulas - Set of 4 Multifunctional Small Kitchen Scraper Lotion Stirrer Tiny Makeup Beauty Spatula Reusable for Jam Jar, Cosmetic Bottles, Narrow Can and Thin Bottles (Black)
description:
About this item
FOOD-GRADE MATERIAL - Anaeat High heat resistant mini spatulas are made with food grade Silicone, heat resistant up to 480°F. Anaeat premium solid silicone design won't let you down by melting or warping.
FLEXIBLE SPATULA - Anaeat silicone spatulas designed with narrow soft heads and long body that can reach many bottles and jars to get every drop out of your container. UPGRADED PROPER BALANCE BETWEEN FLEXIBLE AND STURDY
WIDELY USED SPATULAS - Anaeat flexible mini spatula work well from the small jar to the large mixing bowl in your kitchen, perfect for stirring, scraping, and folding a wide variety of foods, also can be used to mix makeup or paints. Fit well with various containers of cosmetics, mustard jar, lotion, lip gloss, shampoo, conditioner, nail polish, peanut butter, ketchup, etc. Best choice for kitchen and beauty product!
CLEANS EASY, SEAMLESS ONE-PIECE DESIGN - Anaeat spatulas are seamless design that are dishwasher safe, easy to hand washing, and ONE-PIECE DESIGN designed to prevent the build-up of food and grime which allows for safe and healthy using.
BRAND QUALITY GUARANTEE - QUALITY CAN SPEAK ITSELF. Anaeat focuses on kitchenware research and development. We are so confident that we have the best silicone mini spatulas on the market. If you have any problems with Anaeat products, feel free to send us a message by Amazon and we resend to you right away for free, or full money back. We are very concerned about every order, and try our best to Provide our customers with HEALTHY & DURABLE kitchen accessories.
reviews_5s:
These are strong in the handle, soft in the tips, heat resistant bargains!

Their stainless steel core means you can be as delicate or firm as you need to be mixing, decorating, etc and still get the "scrape clean" because of the flexible, soft tips! Great function and form.

Would buy againThis set of spatulas has multiple purposes in my kitchen. The different sizes provide options for scraping off dirty dishes, frosting cakes, layering desserts, stirring sauces, scooping out condiment jars, stirring sautéing vegetables, etc. These spatulas are my go to tools!These are great quality. They have a nice feel in your hand (they are light but have a bit of heft to them, and feel soft to the touch), and are firm but also flexible enough that you can really scrape into tight spaces. Good variety of sizes, and I appreciate that two of them are a bit cupped like a spoon. I use these daily, and am very pleased with this purchase.My Wife loved this spatula set, multiple uses and size allow this to be able to be used in a variety of areas.The spatula works Well and feels good in your hand. Not too heavy but strong and sturdy in my hand. Good cost great value. Love the colors.I like that it is made in a single material, so dishwasher safe, and has no crevices where food can get stuck. I also like that it is light and narrow, and a good scraper. I am finding it a really useful tool.These narrow spatulas are very high quality. Well made. Neat size. I use them for single scrabbled egg in small six inch skillet. Perfect size for small jobs. Dishwasher proof. Would buy again. Great wedding gift.Ok I keep my evil in the fridge. It gets stiff and I never remember to take it out. So in goes one of these. Stir it around a few seconds and I can dig out what I need. If I need alot, once I stir it, it seems to go liquid faster than just sitting.Was very pleased with the set, lots of uses for these outside of the kitchenI bought these little spatulas, especially for mixing my essential oils with lotions and cleaning out my mini food processor. I’ve used almost all of them so far and they seem to be good quality and they are doing the job perfectly.
reviews_1s: Handle and blade are nearly as thick as the blade is wide. It's basically a silicone coated wire.Broke while cooking during first use.What else is there to say, other than don't waste your moneyNot well moulded - have thin fringes of silicone on the edges. Not pleasant to use as I always think those particles tear off and get to the food.They were cheap but did not help for the job intended
